recommendations.title: Golden Men
recommendations.overview: A group of desperate men, unsatisfied by their lives, decides to attempt a heist to a postal armored truck guard.

recommendations.title: Wacky Heroes
recommendations.overview: Hoping to secure a better future for their thirteen-year-old sister Chiara, Massimo and Fabrizio, two penniless brothers with no prospects, invent an unusual business. Armed with masks and microcameras, they publicly demolish the identities of variou

recommendations.title: The Body
recommendations.overview: A woman’s body disappears mysteriously from the morgue without a trace. Police inspector Jaime Peña investigates the strange occurrence with the help of Álex Ulloa, the widower of the missing woman.

recommendations.title: Rebecca
recommendations.overview: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her han

recommendations.title: The Nightshifter
recommendations.overview: Stênio, the nightshifter of a morgue, has the ability to communicate with the cadavers that are brought to him every night.

recommendations.title: Unrest
recommendations.overview: A young pathology med student suspects that the spirit of a dead cadaver in the hospital morgue where she works is killing off all those who handle or desecrate the body.

recommendations.title: An Inspector Calls
recommendations.overview: An upper-crust family dinner is interrupted by a police inspector who brings news that a girl known to everyone present has died in suspicious circumstances. It seems that any or all of them could have had a hand in her death. But who is the mysterio

recommendations.title: Murder at the Gallop
recommendations.overview: Miss Marple and Mr. Stringer are witnesses to the death by heart attack of elderly, rich Mr. Enderby. Yet they have their doubts about what happened. The police don't believe them, thus leading Miss Marple to yet again investigate by herself.

recommendations.title: Loft
recommendations.overview: Five close friends, all of them married, share a loft to meet their mistresses. One day they find the body of a young woman in the loft. Since there are only five keys to the loft, the five men begin to suspect each other of murder.

recommendations.title: Haseen Dillruba
recommendations.overview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.
